content: # Best AI Video Tools for Social Media Managers in 2026 Social media managers are always racing against the clock to create engaging, high-quality content for multiple platforms. AI video tools are game-changers, letting you create, edit, and optimize videos in a fraction of the time. Explore our complete [[link:/category/Video|Video category]] for more tools. --- ## [[link:/tools/51|VEED]]: All-in-One Social Video Powerhouse VEED is a browser-based video editor perfect for social media — auto-captions, resizing, templates, and AI voiceovers in one place! ### Key Features for Social Media Managers - 📐 **Auto-resizing** — one-click to fit Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, and more - 🔤 **AI captions** — automatic, accurate captions in 100+ languages - 🎨 **Templates** — professional templates for every platform and occasion **Try VEED Free**: {{AFFILIATE_VEED}} --- ## [[link:/tools/201|Pictory]]: Turn Text into Social Videos Pictory excels at converting blog posts, articles, and scripts into engaging social videos with AI voiceovers and automatic B-roll! ### Why It's a Time-Saver - 📝➡️🎬 **Text-to-video** — repurpose existing content into videos quickly - 🎤 **AI voiceovers** — 100+ realistic voices in 20+ languages - 🤖 **Auto B-roll** — automatically adds relevant stock footage **Start Using Pictory**: https://pictory.ai --- ## Quick Comparison | Tool | Best For | Pricing | |------|----------|---------| | VEED | Social media editing, captions, resizing | Free (limited), $12+/month | | Pictory | Text-to-video conversion | Free trial, $19+/month | Ready to revolutionize your social media content creation? Try these tools and reclaim your time! --- For more insights, check out our guide: [[link:/blog/best-ai-video-tools-2026-pictory-veed|Best AI Video Tools 2026]] **Final CTA**: Start your free trial of VEED and create stunning social videos in minutes! {{AFFILIATE_VEED}}
